docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $785.00 FILED BY SZANTO, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT PARMENTER, CHARLENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PARMENTER, CHARLENE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SZANTO, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARMENTER, CHARLENE $785.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $825.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
LETTER FROM CHARLENE PARMENTER RECEIVED REQUESTING APPEAL FORM.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PARMENTER, CHARLENE HEARING SET FOR MAR-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CONTD. REQUEST RECEIVED FROM DEFT. ON MOTION NO FEE. PUT IN CASE FILE FOR JUDGE TO READ AT TIME OF HEARING.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-22-1994, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-26-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-19-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SZANTO, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARMENTER, CHARLENE $260.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $310.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
LETTER SENT TO JUDGE MCBRIDE FROM DEFEND. (C/O STAN).
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PARMENTER, CHARLENE
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23357, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SZANTO, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARMENTER, CHARLENE $260.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $260.00, AMOUNT WAS PAID TO PLAINTIFF AFTER THE HEARING.
